name: create-widget-modal
title: Create Widget Modal
description: The full Create Widget plane — the dashboard's largest surface. A flex-column panel stacking a header (title, time-range pill + date stamp, close), a scrollable widget-type tab strip (Chart, Grid, Top N, Gauge, Heat Map, Anomaly, AI Insights, …), a mid row of live preview pane and a config column with Style / Sorting / Markers / Timeline sub-tabs (chart style chooser, rotation & line-width sliders, legend / points / grid toggles, granularity select, order pills), the data-source builder (vertical colour-coded source tabs, a counter row of Counter / Aggregation / Source Filter / Source / Result By controls with a Σ math button and add/remove, a Filters bar, and source-category chips), and a footer action bar (Reset / Create Widget / Create & Add Widget). Every atom is namespaced under .oo-cwm so toggles, sliders, the style chooser and data-source rows can also render standalone. Default renders in-flow for the gallery; .oo-cwm--overlay + .is-open gives the production fixed-overlay scale-in.
